mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
(SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_leaf WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}))
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt ) VALUES ( , 0, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), 'GRP', 'GROUP', 'GROUP_A1', 1, 300, 500, 3, 1 );
INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt, uniq_id ) SELECT DISTINCT , CASE WHEN grp_parent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE grp_parent END, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = ) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY grp_no), 'GRP', 'GROUP', 'GROUP_A1', grp_no, 300, 500, 3, 1, grp_no FROM nt_cfg_group A WHERE grp_no IN AND grp_no != 0 AND grp_parent != 0 AND A.grp_type = 1

INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt ) SELECT , grp_no, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY mng_no), dev_kind1, dev_kind2, CONCAT(dev_kind2, '_A1'), mng_no, 300, 500, 3, 1 FROM cm_dev10 A WHERE grp_no IN

INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt ) SELECT , grp_no, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sub_no), 'SUB', 'SUBNET', 'SUBNET_A1', sub_no, 300, 500, 3, 1 FROM nt_cfg_subnet A WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT grp_no FROM nt_cfg_group WHERE grp_no IN )

INSERT INTO cm_topo_group ( grp_parent, grp_no, grp_name, user_id ) SELECT grp_parent, grp_no, grp_name, FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN grp_parent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE grp_parent END AS grp_parent, grp_no, grp_name FROM nt_cfg_group WHERE grp_type = 7 AND grp_no IN ( SELECT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_grp_leaf WHERE grp_no IN (SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}) ) ) A;
INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt, uniq_id ) SELECT DISTINCT , CASE WHEN grp_parent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE grp_parent END, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY grp_no), 'GRP', 'GROUP', 'GROUP_A1', grp_no, 300, 500, 3, 1, grp_no FROM nt_cfg_group A WHERE grp_type = 7 AND grp_no IN ( SELECT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_grp_leaf WHERE grp_no IN (SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}) ) ORDER BY grp_no

INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt ) SELECT , grp_no, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rack_no), 'RACK', 'RACK', 'RACK_A1', rack_no, 300, 500, 3, 1 FROM s_cm_rack A WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_grp_leaf WHERE grp_no IN (SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}) )
